questionHtml: Calculate the equilibrium price and quantity per month.
markschemeHtml:
249 − 4P = 150 + 14P
99 = 18P 

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

P = $5.50, Q = 227 

An answer of 5.50, 227 (without working) is sufficient for [1].
